content: 16.1 — Credentials provisionnés backend/.env (Telegram bot token, X creds, BonkBot ref). Trojan stub vide.
16.2 — Founder Buy Disclosure : trigger founder_buy + endpoint admin + dialog manuel + 4 templates (EN/FR × 2 variants)
16.3 — Affiliate refs : public endpoint + secret_provider helpers + section landing 'Access Secured Terminals' rendue OK
16.4 — KOL Mention Listener foundation : module + trigger kol_mention + 4 templates + admin endpoints + APScheduler tick (poll DISABLED jusqu'à confirmation tier X API)
16.5 — Pre-export hygiene : .gitignore couvre .env à 2 niveaux + grep secrets sur fichiers tracked = 0 fuite
Frontend : section landing OK + dialogs admin propaganda étendus pour founder_buy + kol_mention
Build + lint + tests E2E + memo de rotation final
